channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/8)
channel.description: 今天的信息量不小，而且质量很高。最明显的感觉是，围绕着 **AI Agent (特别是 Codex/Claude Code) 的生态** 正在快速成型：有人在做更便宜的替代品、有人在做统一的文件系统、还有人在做远程控制工具。另外，关于 **模型选择、成本控制、甚至具体的 DevOps 工具** 都有一些很精彩的讨论和项目。咱们一个一个来看。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的信息量不小，而且质量很高。最明显的感觉是，围绕着 **AI Agent (特别是 Codex/Claude Code) 的生态** 正在快速成型：有人在做更便宜的替代品、有人在做统一的文件系统、还有人在做远程控制工具。另外，关于 **模型选择、成本控制、甚至具体的 DevOps 工具** 都有一些很精彩的讨论和项目。咱们一个一个来看。

item.title: aattaran/deepclaude
item.description: Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro, OpenRouter, or any Anthropic-compatible backend. Same UX, 17x cheaper. | 近期热门 | 总 1601 stars
item.author: aattaran

item.title: yaojingang/yao-open-prompts
item.description: Yao Open Prompts：中文 AI 提示词库，覆盖工作、学习、内容、营销和生活场景 | 近期热门 | 总 1189 stars
item.author: yaojingang

item.title: XBuilderLAB/cheat-on-content
item.description: Content is already a cheat-code race—whoever cracks the patterns first wins the traffic. Your auto-evolving ops expert that learns YOUR account, not the global average. The Claude Code workflow behind 1M followers in 1 month. | 近期热门 | 总 1053 stars
item.author: XBuilderLAB

item.title: strukto-ai/mirage
item.description: A Unified Virtual Filesystem For AI Agents | 近期热门 | 总 1051 stars
item.author: strukto-ai

item.title: crafter-station/petdex
item.description: Public gallery of animated Codex pets | 近期热门 | 总 990 stars
item.author: crafter-station

item.title: vibeforge1111/keep-codex-fast
item.description: A backup-first Codex skill for keeping local Codex state fast, clean, and recoverable. | 近期热门 | 总 878 stars
item.author: vibeforge1111

item.title: matthart1983/syswatch
item.description: Single-host system diagnostics TUI. Sibling to netwatch. Twelve tabs, plain-English insights, session scrubber. macOS + Linux. | 近期热门 | 总 387 stars
item.author: matthart1983

item.title: thcp/stemdeck
item.description: Stemdeck is an AI-powered stem extraction platform for musicians and producers, designed to isolate vocals, drums, bass, piano and guitar for practice, transcription, remixing, and creative audio workflows through a modern and interactive interface | 近期热门 | 总 345 stars
item.author: thcp

item.title: moxailoo/univ3-pool-lens
item.description: A focused TypeScript toolkit for inspecting Uniswap V3 pools — liquidity distribution, fee yield, and impermanent-loss math from your terminal. | 近期热门 | 总 298 stars
item.author: moxailoo
